name: Forklift Injury Reporting Deadlines in Boise ID

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to report a forklift injury to my employer in Boise ID?
mainEntity.text: How long do I have to report a forklift injury to my employer in Boise ID?

acceptedAnswer.text: Idaho requires reporting workplace injuries like forklift accidents to your employer within 60 days; claims must be filed with Idaho Industrial Commission within 1 year. Late reports risk denial of benefits including medical and wage loss.

suggestedAnswer.text: Prompt reporting preserves your right to medical care, temporary disability (2/3 wages), and impairment benefits. Boise employers in logistics often contest claims; document everything with photos, witnesses. Idaho surety bond system means carriers may minimize payouts—attorney ensures full TTD, PPD, and rehab benefits without gaps.
